title: wedelia tambilloana
intro: Wedelia tambilloana, also known as Yellow Daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Wedelia tambilloana include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Wedelia tambilloana can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
